utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Fully specified. 5) total_budget: present with complete monthly and annual cost breakdown, including comparisons and savings. Fully specified. All 5 items are included and fully detailed.
